title: KelvinOutlierDetection
content:
# KelvinOutlierDetection


## Properties

- **enabled** (`boolean`): Define if the outlier detection algorithm is enabled.
- **configuration** (`object`): The configuration for the outlier detection algorithm.

enabled.description: Define if the outlier detection algorithm is enabled.

configuration.description: The configuration for the outlier detection algorithm.

model.description: The model to use for outlier detection. This is used in the outlier detection algorithm to determine how to identify outliers in the data.

z_score.description: The configuration for the z-score outlier detection model.

window_size.description: The size of the window to check for outliers.
